def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    The weight and distance distribution imbalance features are derived from existing numerical features, capturing meaningful relationships between Left-Weight and Left-Distance and Right-Weight and Right-Distance.
    New Feature 1: abs_left_weight_difference | abs_left_weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Left-Distance)
    New Feature 2: abs_right_weight_difference | abs_right_weight_difference = abs(Right-Weight - Right-Distance)
    New Feature 3: left_weight_to_distance_ratio | left_weight_to_distance_ratio = Left-Weight / Left-Distance
    New Feature 4: right_weight_to_distance_ratio | right_weight_to_distance_ratio = Right-Weight / Right-Distance
    New Feature 5: left_distance_to_weight_ratio | left_distance_to_weight_ratio = Left-Distance / Left-Weight
    New Feature 6: right_distance_to_weight_ratio | right_distance_to_weight_ratio = Right-Distance / Right-Weight
    New Feature 7: weight_difference_sum | weight_difference_sum = Left-Weight + Right-Weight
    New Feature 8: weight_distance_product_diff_norm | weight_distance_product_diff_norm = (weight_distance_product_diff - weight_distance_product_diff.max()) / (weight_distance_product_diff.max() - weight_distance_product_diff.min())
    Removed Features: 
    weight_distance_product_diff and distance_ratio since they are highly correlated with weight_distance_product and average_distance_difference respectively
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute differences between Left-Weight and Left-Distance and Right-Weight and Right-Distance
    df_output['abs_left_weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Left-Distance'])
    df_output['abs_right_weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Right-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
